title: Star Wars Planets
description: An addon for Beyond Earth adding Planets From Star Wars
body:
![SWPlanets](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/889464315533475891/975071956246335590/Sans_titre_6.png)

Star Wars Planets is an addon of the mod Beyond Earth wich add the famous planets of Star Wars like : 
  

Kamino 💧
![Kamino](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QscEnvuA/images/a1bdfa0456c9316f97c8142d4f6853e6d6c42bd1.png)

 
Tatooine⏳
![Tatooine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/9fc9a9b019b51acfc589024cb2d43a0cfe8da624.png)


 

Endor 🌲
![Endor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/e119a66e7b39bdc7b6596cccd19bc27b406f2d42.png)


 

Hoth 🧊
![Hot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QscEnvuA/images/82c45aff955a323e1200b030be54c2e3bf8da58d.png)


 

Mustafar🔥
![Hot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/769b41e9988291004e71f0b0827bc89f12785e7f.png)
 

 

Planets are cool but what is more cool ?
**LIGHTSABERS**!
![lightsaber](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/978717923948499055/984862875833221160/unknown.png)

Ho, I forgot something : i add the possibility to change the Minecraft Main Menu Background and the name of the galaxy (mainly for modpack makers or server owners)
![background](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/969609610182934608/991738134268223509/unknown.png)
 

 

### Language available  :

- French 
- English
 

You can use this mod in your Modpack

 


### Credits

**Yettai_Yogenhiem for his Build**
 



💖A BIG thanks to MrScautHD and TheRealm18 for their help !

A problem 🤨? Go to my discord server or/and report the issue in the github !
